untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit head-and-shoulders pattern detection with right shoulder identification (point E), neckline penetration verification, and zigzag filter threshold comparison. These are structural pattern recognition features that cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Returns, Bar Properties). The signal requires custom pattern detection logic not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: ARONSON_DRY_0_1 describes a pattern-based entry conditional on zigzag filter validation against penetration distance. The core logic (neckline penetration with filter threshold confirmation) cannot be mapped to standard technical indicators. Attempted proxy using pivot as neckline proxy and ATR ratio approximation, but this does not capture the actual pattern structure validation required by the source rule.
